message:
Running command: echo "$(date)"
# Check Yosys state
pgrep -a -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# Check ABC
pgrep -a "abc" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# LR memory
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Log not growing - check last write time vs now
stat -c "log mtime=%y size=%s" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log

function.arguments:
{"command": "echo "$(date)"
# Check Yosys state
pgrep -a -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# Check ABC
pgrep -a "abc" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# LR memory
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Log not growing - check last write time vs now
stat -c "log mtime=%y size=%s" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
echo "$(date)"
# Check Yosys state
pgrep -a -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# Check ABC
pgrep -a "abc" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo ""
# LR memory
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,vsz,rss,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Log not growing - check last write time vs now
stat -c "log mtime=%y size=%s" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
